qa_pairs.question: What is the primary function of this PyTorch Lightning script?
qa_pairs.answer: This Python script is designed for conducting parallel tests on CIFAR10 classification models using the PyTorch Lightning framework.

qa_pairs.question: Which command-line parameters are configurable when executing this PyTorch Lightning CIFAR10 classification test script?
qa_pairs.answer: You can configure the learning rate (`--lr`), the maximum number of training epochs (`--max_epochs`), the batch size (`--batch_size`), and the number of data loader workers (`--num_workers`) through command-line arguments.
